entry.title: Re: What’s New Preview Available for SAP Analytics Cloud Q1 2025
entry.content:
Hello @JefB,

You can have a look into help page of job monitor using this link. But there are no screenshots available.

Best regards

Lothar

entry.title: Re: CCode XYZX: Fiscal year change 2025 has failed for so...
entry.content:
Hello, You are on the right track, 

Please check asset number holding the the same table for the year 2023 and check the posting for the assets and you can correct it and clear the same.

entry.title: Adding new properties for Business Partner Group
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I want to add a new property for my existing business partner group, what should I do for this?

entry.title: Inquiry Regarding Outbound Delivery and API Options in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,
I am a Sales Module consultant working on an SAP Public Cloud project.

I have the following questions:
1. Is the creation of split outbound delivery documents only possible using the "Create Outbound Delivery with Order Reference" app?


2. What APIs are available for creating split outbound delivery documents? From my research, it seems that there are no APIs available for this.


3. Our client’s system first determines the shipping timing in an external system, and therefore, the outbound delivery process is also handled within that external system.
The client’s requirement is to ensure that outbound delivery operations performed in the external system are reflected in SAP Public Cloud.

Given this scenario, I am considering two options:
1. Providing an API for creating outbound delivery documents so that the external system can directly create them in SAP Public Cloud.

2. Providing an API for creating sales orders so that the external system generates sales orders, which can then be used for outbound delivery processing in SAP Public Cloud.


Would you recommend one approach over the other, or do you have a better suggestion?
I would appreciate any insights you can provide.
Thank you.

entry.title: Re: How to process the claim transaction in the SCOPE-ITE...
entry.content:
Hi,

Scope Item: 1WQ_CN, https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2502/SolP/1WQ?region=CN In the test script of scope item, there is step process for claim payable transaction.

Meanwhile, there is white-book about bill of exchange payable process, you find detail process in 中国本地化汇票管理产品白皮书

Hope this would help you.

Best Regards,

Kiki

entry.title: Re: How to implement a custom entity in the ABAP RESTful Programming Model using remote function mod
entry.content:
Hello @Andre_Fischer ,

The reason to use Custom Entities is because i don't want to create unnecessary tables, and Custom Entity seems only supports unmanaged scenarios.

Here's my detailed information:

CDS Views:

@EndUserText.label: 'Asset Retirement'
define root custom entity ZCE_Asset_Retirements
{
  key RetirementId        : abap.numc( 10 );
      Testrun             : flag;
      AssetRetirementData : composition [0..*] of ZCE_Asset_Retirement;
}


@EndUserText.label: 'Asset Retirement'
define custom entity ZCE_Asset_Retirement
{
  key RetirementId                 : abap.numc( 10 );
  key CompanyCode                  : bukrs;
  key MasterFixedAsset             : bf_anln1;
  key FixedAsset                   : bf_anln2;
  key DocumentNumber               : belnr_d;
      UserName                     : usnam;
      DocumentType                 : blart;
      DocumentDate                 : bldat;
      PostingDate                  : budat;
      FiscalYear                   : gjahr;
      FiscalPeriod                 : monat;
      TranslationDate              : wwert_d;
      AssetTransactionType         : bf_anbwa;
      DepreciationArea             : afabe_post;
      LedgerGroup                  : bf_target_ldgrp;
      AccountingPrinciple          : accounting_principle;
      Assignmentnumber             : dzuonr;
      DocumentHeaderText           : bktxt;
      ReferenceDocumentNumber      : xblnr;
      ItemText                     : sgtxt;
      IsCompleteRetirement         : bf_xvabg;
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode : 'Currency'
      Amount                       : bf_anbtr;
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode : 'Currency'
      RevenueAmount                : bf_erlbt;
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode : 'Currency'
      CostAmount                   : bf_verko_d;
      Currency                     : waers;
      @Semantics.quantity.unitOfMeasure : 'BaseUnit'
      Quantity                     : menge_d;
      BaseUnit                     : meins;
      Percentage                   : bf_prozs;
      RevenueFromNetBookValue      : bf_xerbw;
      DepreciationAreaNetBookValue : afabe_rbwe;
      AssetValueDate               : bf_bzdat;
      OrderNumber                  : aufnr;
      FunctionalArea               : fkber;
      AssetRetirements             : association to parent ZCE_Asset_Retirements on $projection.RetirementId = AssetRetirements.RetirementId;
}

Behavior definition:

 

unmanaged implementation in class zbp_ce_asset_retirements unique;
strict ( 2 ); //Uncomment this line in order to enable strict mode 2. The strict mode has two variants (strict(1), strict(2)) and is prerequisite to be future proof regarding syntax and to be able to release your BO.

define behavior for ZCE_Asset_Retirements  alias AssetRetirements
late numbering
lock master
authorization master ( instance )
//etag master <field_name>
{
  create;
  update;
  delete;
  association AssetRetirementData { create; }
}

define behavior for ZCE_Asset_Retirement  alias AssetRetirementData
late numbering
lock dependent by AssetRetirements
authorization dependent by AssetRetirements
//etag master <field_name>
{
  update;
  delete;
  field ( readonly ) RetirementId;
  association AssetRetirements;
}

 

Behavior implementation Class (part):

CLASS lhc_ce_asset_retirements DEFINITION INHERITING FROM cl_abap_behavior_handler.

  PUBLIC SECTION.

    TYPES:
      ts_entity_retirement        TYPE STRUCTURE FOR CREATE zce_asset_retirements\\assetretirements,
      ts_entity_cba_retirement    TYPE STRUCTURE FOR CREATE zce_asset_retirements\\assetretirements\assetretirementdata,
      ts_target                   TYPE LINE OF ts_entity_cba_retirement-%target,
      tt_entities_retirements     TYPE TABLE FOR CREATE zce_asset_retirements\\assetretirements,
      tt_entities_cba_retirements TYPE TABLE FOR CREATE zce_asset_retirements\\assetretirements\assetretirementdata.

    CLASS-DATA:
      mt_entities_retirements     TYPE tt_entities_retirements,
      mt_entities_cba_retirements TYPE tt_entities_cba_retirements.

  PRIVATE SECTION.

    METHODS get_instance_authorizations FOR INSTANCE AUTHORIZATION
      IMPORTING keys REQUEST requested_authorizations FOR assetretirements RESULT result.

    METHODS create FOR MODIFY
      IMPORTING entities FOR CREATE assetretirements.

    METHODS update FOR MODIFY
      IMPORTING entities FOR UPDATE assetretirements.

    METHODS delete FOR MODIFY
      IMPORTING keys FOR DELETE assetretirements.

    METHODS read FOR READ
      IMPORTING keys FOR READ assetretirements RESULT result.

    METHODS lock FOR LOCK
      IMPORTING keys FOR LOCK assetretirements.

    METHODS rba_assetretirementdata FOR READ
      IMPORTING keys_rba FOR READ assetretirements\assetretirementdata FULL result_requested RESULT result LINK association_links.

    METHODS cba_assetretirementdata FOR MODIFY
      IMPORTING entities_cba FOR CREATE assetretirements\assetretirementdata.

ENDCLASS.

CLASS lhc_ce_asset_retirements IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD get_instance_authorizations.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD create.

    mt_entities_retirements = entities.

  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD update.

  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD delete.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD read.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD lock.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD rba_assetretirementdata.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD cba_assetretirementdata.

    mt_entities_cba_retirements = entities_cba.

  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

CLASS lhc_ce_asset_retirement DEFINITION INHERITING FROM cl_abap_behavior_handler.
  PRIVATE SECTION.

    METHODS update FOR MODIFY
      IMPORTING entities FOR UPDATE assetretirementdata.

    METHODS delete FOR MODIFY
      IMPORTING keys FOR DELETE assetretirementdata.

    METHODS read FOR READ
      IMPORTING keys FOR READ assetretirementdata RESULT result.

    METHODS rba_ssetretirements FOR READ
      IMPORTING keys_rba FOR READ assetretirementdata\assetretirements FULL result_requested RESULT result LINK association_links.

ENDCLASS.

CLASS lhc_ce_asset_retirement IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD update.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD delete.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD read.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD rba_ssetretirements.
  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

CLASS lsc_ce_asset_retirements DEFINITION INHERITING FROM cl_abap_behavior_saver.

  PROTECTED SECTION.

    METHODS finalize REDEFINITION.

    METHODS check_before_save REDEFINITION.

    METHODS save REDEFINITION.

    METHODS adjust_numbers REDEFINITION.

    METHODS cleanup REDEFINITION.

    METHODS cleanup_finalize REDEFINITION.

  PRIVATE SECTION.

    TYPES: BEGIN OF mty_retirement,
             entity_cba_retirement TYPE LINE OF lhc_ce_asset_retirements=>tt_entities_cba_retirements,
             target                TYPE lhc_ce_asset_retirements=>ts_target,
             testrun               TYPE flag,
             companycode           TYPE bukrs,
             masterfixedasset      TYPE anln1,
             fixedasset            TYPE anln2,
             generalpostingdata    TYPE bapifapo_gen_info,
             retirementdata        TYPE bapifapo_ret,
             accountassignments    TYPE bapifapo_acc_ass,
             documentreference     TYPE bapifapo_doc_ref,
             origindocreference    TYPE bapifapo_doc_ref,
             furtherpostingdata    TYPE bapifapo_add_info,
             return                TYPE bapiret2,
             returns               TYPE bapiret2_tab,
           END OF mty_retirement.

    DATA: mt_retirements        TYPE TABLE OF mty_retirement,
          mo_asset_bapi_wrapper TYPE REF TO zif_asset_bapi_wrapper.

    TYPES: ts_failed   TYPE RESPONSE FOR FAILED LATE zce_asset_retirements,
           ts_reported TYPE RESPONSE FOR REPORTED LATE zce_asset_retirements.

    METHODS: fill_parameters
      IMPORTING it_entities_retirements     TYPE lhc_ce_asset_retirements=>tt_entities_retirements
                it_entities_cba_retirements TYPE lhc_ce_asset_retirements=>tt_entities_cba_retirements.

    METHODS: fill_messages
      IMPORTING is_entity_cba_retirement TYPE lhc_ce_asset_retirements=>ts_entity_cba_retirement OPTIONAL
                is_target                TYPE lhc_ce_asset_retirements=>ts_target OPTIONAL
                it_return                TYPE bapiret2_tab
      CHANGING  cs_failed                TYPE ts_failed OPTIONAL
                cs_reported              TYPE ts_reported.

ENDCLASS.

CLASS lsc_ce_asset_retirements IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD finalize.


  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD check_before_save.

    me->fill_parameters(
      it_entities_retirements     = lhc_ce_asset_retirements=>mt_entities_retirements
      it_entities_cba_retirements = lhc_ce_asset_retirements=>mt_entities_cba_retirements
    ).

    mo_asset_bapi_wrapper = zcl_asset_bapi_wrap_fact=>create_instance( ).

    LOOP AT mt_retirements ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_retirement>).
      mo_asset_bapi_wrapper->bapi_asset_retirement_post(
        EXPORTING
          iv_testrun            = 'X'
          is_accountassignments = <lfs_retirement>-accountassignments
          is_furtherpostingdata = <lfs_retirement>-furtherpostingdata
          is_generalpostingdata = <lfs_retirement>-generalpostingdata
          is_origindocreference = <lfs_retirement>-origindocreference
          is_retirementdata     = <lfs_retirement>-retirementdata
        IMPORTING
          es_return             = <lfs_retirement>-return
        CHANGING
          ct_return             = <lfs_retirement>-returns ).

      me->fill_messages(
        EXPORTING
          is_entity_cba_retirement = <lfs_retirement>-entity_cba_retirement
          is_target                = <lfs_retirement>-target
          it_return                = <lfs_retirement>-returns
        CHANGING
          cs_failed                = failed
          cs_reported              = reported
      ).

    ENDLOOP.

  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD adjust_numbers.


  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD save.

    LOOP AT mt_retirements ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_retirement>).
      mo_asset_bapi_wrapper->bapi_asset_retirement_post(
        EXPORTING
          iv_testrun            = <lfs_retirement>-testrun
          is_accountassignments = <lfs_retirement>-accountassignments
          is_furtherpostingdata = <lfs_retirement>-furtherpostingdata
          is_generalpostingdata = <lfs_retirement>-generalpostingdata
          is_origindocreference = <lfs_retirement>-origindocreference
          is_retirementdata     = <lfs_retirement>-retirementdata
        IMPORTING
          es_return             = <lfs_retirement>-return
        CHANGING
          ct_return             = <lfs_retirement>-returns ).

      me->fill_messages(
        EXPORTING
          is_entity_cba_retirement = <lfs_retirement>-entity_cba_retirement
          is_target                = <lfs_retirement>-target
          it_return                = <lfs_retirement>-returns
        CHANGING
          cs_reported              = reported
      ).

    ENDLOOP.

  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD cleanup.

    FREE mo_asset_bapi_wrapper.
    CLEAR mt_retirements.

  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD cleanup_finalize.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD fill_parameters.

    mt_retirements = VALUE  #( FOR ls_entity_cba_retirement IN it_entities_cba_retirements
                                FOR ls_target IN ls_entity_cba_retirement-%target
                                ( entity_cba_retirement = ls_entity_cba_retirement
                                  target                = CORRESPONDING #( ls_target )
                                  companycode           = ls_target-companycode
                                  masterfixedasset      = ls_target-masterfixedasset
                                  fixedasset            = ls_target-fixedasset
                                  testrun               = it_entities_retirements[ 1 ]-testrun
                                  generalpostingdata    = VALUE #(  username      = ls_target-username
                                                                    doc_type      = ls_target-documenttype
                                                                    doc_date      = ls_target-documentdate
                                                                    pstng_date    = ls_target-postingdate
                                                                    fis_period    = ls_target-fiscalperiod
                                                                    trans_date    = ls_target-translationdate
                                                                    comp_code     = ls_target-companycode
                                                                    assetmaino    = ls_target-masterfixedasset
                                                                    assetsubno    = ls_target-fixedasset
                                                                    assettrtyp    = ls_target-assettransactiontype
                                                                    depr_area     = ls_target-depreciationarea
                                                                    ledger_group  = ls_target-ledgergroup
                                                                    acc_principle = ls_target-accountingprinciple )

                                  retirementdata        = VALUE #(  compl_ret     =  ls_target-iscompleteretirement
                                                                    amount        = ls_target-amount
                                                                    ret_costs     = ls_target-costamount
                                                                    currency      = ls_target-currency
                                                                    quantity      = ls_target-quantity
                                                                    base_uom      = ls_target-baseunit
                                                                    perc_rate     = ls_target-percentage
                                                                    rev_nbv_in    = ls_target-revenuefromnetbookvalue
                                                                    area_nbv      = ls_target-depreciationareanetbookvalue
                                                                    valuedate     = ls_target-assetvaluedate )

                                  accountassignments    = VALUE #(  orderid       = ls_target-ordernumber
                                                                    func_area     = ls_target-functionalarea )
                                  furtherpostingdata    = VALUE #(  alloc_nmbr    = ls_target-assignmentnumber
                                                                    header_txt    = ls_target-documentheadertext
                                                                    ref_doc_no    = ls_target-referencedocumentnumber
                                                                    item_text     = ls_target-itemtext ) ) ).

  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD fill_messages.

    LOOP AT it_return ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_return>) WHERE type EQ 'E'.
      APPEND VALUE #( %key = is_target-%key ) TO cs_failed-assetretirementdata.
      EXIT.
    ENDLOOP.

    LOOP AT it_return ASSIGNING <lfs_return>.
      APPEND VALUE #( %key = is_target-%key
                      %msg  = new_message( severity = SWITCH #( <lfs_return>-type
                                                        WHEN 'E' THEN if_abap_behv_message=>severity-error
                                                        WHEN 'W' THEN if_abap_behv_message=>severity-warning
                                                        WHEN 'S' THEN if_abap_behv_message=>severity-success
                                                        WHEN 'I' THEN if_abap_behv_message=>severity-warning )
                                           id       = <lfs_return>-id
                                           number   = <lfs_return>-number
                                           v1       = <lfs_return>-message_v1
                                           v2       = <lfs_return>-message_v2
                                           v3       = <lfs_return>-message_v3
                                           v4       = <lfs_return>-message_v4 ) documentnumber = 'test'  ) TO cs_reported-assetretirementdata.
    ENDLOOP.

  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.​

after created service definition and service binding, i tested the API via Gateway client, the result is:

the header of the response in green box can see the successful / failed message, if successfully ran, document number also appears in header sap-messages field, but this is not i want, i want it update in "DcocumentNumber" field of the response body..

I attempted:

  • Later Numbering: Tried using "adjust_numbers" to update the mapped table, but the mapped table remains empty, nothing was passed to the method by the framework.

  • EML MODIFY ENTITIES ... IN LOCAL MODE: Tested in the save method, but it appears EML is unsupported for custom entities or conflicts with the save sequence. Tired to use READ ENTITIES for several methods of the saver class, all failed.

but all were failed.

p.s.: codes for the attempts are already removed now.

Hope it makes clearer to understand..

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP Digital Manufacturing with Microsoft Teams: A Comprehensive Guide
entry.content:
Hello @bechtify ,

Sure, I will update this blog.

BR,
Kartik Singhal

entry.title: Re: CRM Utilities - Authorization restriction in contract...
entry.content:
Good Morning Christian,

What you can do, at least I would:

  • Check in the Service subtree of SPRO
    • If there is a fitting determination Profile under Organizational Data Determination. You can see the Rules which lead you to suitable Function Modules (like CRM_ORGMAN_ORGOBJECTS_FIND_11) 
    • Enter any of those into the Transaction Customizing
  • Implement a Report
    • Get main Partner from OneOrder
    • Call logic similar to the Function Module in the determination rule to get the Partners Org.
    • Put the data into the Transaction by CRM_ORDER_MAINTAIN or using BOL.

Of course this is just very brief. You might possibly want to go with the organization assignment of the Employee Repsonsible on the Contract instead of the main Partner (Customer). 

Keep in mind that for Utilities Contracts you do have one Item per Division. Data has to be placed there, too! As far as I remember data could even be different per Item. I know if you are creating the Contracts in the IC part of S/4 I believe you have to login Partner and Contract Account before Contract maintenance is possible, but the Account might be changed afterwards. 

Hope this gives you a little guidance. Has been some time since I last touched the Utilities part of S/4.

Cheers Carsten

entry.title: Re: Reducing the VM size of HANA in Rise PCE
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes its possible but would require a contract restructure.

Best Regards
Henrik Strange

entry.title: Re: DI API update report layout menu item name
entry.content:
Hi,

I've tried

var service = (SAPbobsCOM.ReportLayoutsService)company.GetCompanyService().GetBusinessService(SAPbobsCOM.ServiceTypes.ReportLayoutsService);

var parameters = (SAPbobsCOM.ReportLayoutParams)service.GetDataInterface(SAPbobsCOM.ReportLayoutsServiceDataInterfaces.rlsdiReportLayoutParams);
parameters.LayoutCode = "RCRI0031";

var report = service.GetReportLayout(parameters);
report.Name = "Report 1 (Renamed from DI API)";

service.UpdatePrinterSettings(report);

 

But the menu item is not renamed.

Tomas

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: I am very happy and excited to be a part for this community. Hopefully I can contribute here and learn more so that I can reach at my dream milestones.

entry.title: Unable to Post Payload to SOAP API using SAP CPI !
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am working on integrating Zoho People (Third-Party HRMS) with SAP Public Cloud to create workforce/employee records. I am using SAP CPI to send data to SAP’s SOAP API. However, I am encountering an error, and I need guidance on resolving it.

Scenario Overview

  1. API Selection & Testing:

    • I found the required SOAP API on api.sap.com for replicating workforce data from a third-party HRMS.
    • Using SAP Documentation, I created the SOAP payload and tested it successfully in SOAP UI—it works fine.

  2. Issue When Using SAP CPI:

    • The same SOAP request fails when sent via SAP CPI.
    • Error from SAP SOAP API Log: Message "Envelope{http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/}" not supported (interface: "WORKFORCEPERSONMASTERDATAREPLI" binding

      CPI Integration Flow (iFlow) Design
  • Sender Adapter: HTTPS
  • Processing Steps:
    1. Content Modifier – Preparing Headers
    2. JSON to XML Converter – Converting JSON to XML
    3. Content Modifier – Adding SOAP envelope, binding values using XPath
    4. Request-Reply – Calling SOAP API
    5. Receiver Adapter: SOAP


       

Observations:

  • I simulated the iFlow and checked the payload before the request-reply step → It matches exactly with the payload tested in SOAP UI.
  • However, the same payload does not work when passed via SAP CPI.
  • When copied from CPI and tested in SOAP UI manually, it works.

Questions:

  1. What could be causing the "Envelope not supported" error when sending the request via SAP CPI?
  2. Are there any specific headers or content-type settings that SAP SOAP APIs expect from CPI?
  3. Could this issue be related to SOAP envelope namespaces? If so, how can I correct them in CPI?
  4. Are there any specific configurations needed in the SOAP receiver adapter for SAP Public Cloud APIs?

Any insights or suggestions would be highly appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: How to get authenticated user information with CAP in three different ways - Directly from the U
entry.content: For anyone who is struggling with the 404 error, when you call the endpoint "/user-api/currentUser", try removing the leading forward slash so "user-api/currentUser". The leading forward slash references an absolute path (subaccount) rather than a relative path (application)

entry.title: Re: Scheduling Data Load Jobs in Calendar Task
entry.content:
Hi,

you can use Multi-Actions which can be scheduled via calendar. Multi-Actions can include beside others data import jobs, which can be data model imports and/or dimension imports.

BR,

Thomas

entry.title: Re: How to call public cloud SAP API from embedded steamp...
entry.content: Could you please elaborate on how you did the setup? I am getting an error 404 resource not found when calling the execute method via the proxy.

entry.title: Re: New ABAP syntax, VALUE FOR skip appending entry if it already exists
entry.content:
If your table tab_with_duplicates is a sorted table you can try this (I renamed the column key to key_col):

 

 

r_unduplicated_values = VALUE #(
    FOR row_of_tab_with_duplicates IN tab_with_duplicates
    ( LINES OF COND #( WHEN lines(
                           FILTER #( tab_with_duplicates USING KEY primary_key
                           WHERE key_col = row_of_tab_with_duplicates-key_col ) ) > 1
                       THEN VALUE #( ( row_of_tab_with_duplicates ) ) ) ) ).

entry.title: Re: How to configure T042E_WANFF(Number of Days Until Bil...
entry.content:
Hi Kaito,

Good Day!

I have double checked with our development team, in the current process of generating BOEs in the app Manage Automatic Payment, the Due Date is a required field. When manually entering this date, you can input your desired BOE due date, which will then appear on the generated documents. However, in the configuration activity 'Set Up Payment Methods per Company Code for Payment Transactions,' this field cannot be modified now. This field is meant for incoming BOE requests, not for outgoing BOEs.

Hope the information could help you.

 

Best regards,

Lola

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (Bangalore, India)
entry.content: I am interested.

entry.title: SAM MM
entry.content:
In rounding profile 5000, quota 70:30 - planned deliveries does not respect quota in case rounding profile in maintained.
if we use rounding profile only in quota arrangement, the quota 30% for 2nd supplier is not considered (higher quantity than 1st supplier).
If I set up 5000 pcs for both, only 1st suppliers is planned. I don't understand that...
Can anyone provide solution how to set quota for this schenerio.

entry.title: Re: Premium Hub CoE – DSC Knowledge Bits Series – Field Catalogs for Transportation Cockpit in SAP T
entry.content: Thanks Aleksey , Very useful .  If you can show us how to implement a custom logic of FBI views that would be great

entry.title: Re: Rise in Hypersaler IBM
entry.content:
No,

Currently we support AWS, Azure, GCP and SAP own Datacenters.

Best Regards
Henrik Strange

entry.title: What is the maintenance order header data source (Table) on public cloud?
entry.content: We are trying to create a custom report on SAP S/4 HANA cloud public edition and we need maintenance order header data source (table) to create join with other associated data source. I have found data source for maintenance request/notification but could not find the maintenance order data source. It was AUFK on S/4 HANA on-premise system but I'm unable to find that on public cloud.

entry.title: Re: Integration of SAP CI(BTP IS) with Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying with this payload

<root>
<Insert_Statement1>
<dbTableName action="INSERT">
<table>1TR_Quotes_01</table>
<access>
<Quote_ID>12345</Quote_ID>
<Quote_Number>1234</Quote_Number>
<Owner_ID>67890</Owner_ID>
</access>
</dbTableName>

 

But I receive always the same error message

Error Details
com.sap.it.rt.adapter.jdbc.exceptions.JDBCException: The processing has failed due to error in creating metadata table. : com.sap.db.jdbc.exceptions.JDBCDriverException: SAP DBTech JDBC: [257] (at 29): sql syntax error: incorrect syntax near "WHERE": line 1 col 29 (at pos 29)
 
If I modify the payload the error is the same. 
Could you help with this?
 
Thanks

entry.title: While placing order from SAP ERP the ATP check in APO is check wrong PAG
entry.content:
While placing order from SAP ERP the ATP check in APO is checking a wrong PAG and not referring to the production allocation group (PAG) maintained against the product allocation procedure (PAP) in the ATP tab of APO material master.

Product : P1
Location : L1
Batches : B1 & B2
PAP maintained on material master at P1 & L1 level : PAP1
PAG linked to PAP1 is PAG1
while placing order for batch B1, the correct PAG (PAG1) is being checked.
But while placing order for batch B2 for the same material/location another PAG(PAG2) that is not maintained in the material master in APO is being called and show the CVC error.

Characteristics combination for item 0303956542/000010 was not found

Message no. /SAPAPO/ATP201



Please help if anyone has encountered/resolved this error.

entry.title: Re: Discover the SAP Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
Hi wridgeu,

thanks for alerting me to this problem with the external visibility of the video! 
A colleague adapted a setting on the video and now the access should work.

Best regards,
Ruth

entry.title: Re: What is shown under 'Latest replies'?
entry.content:
So, the advanced search does not seem to work in any usefull fashion.

For example, I searched for "SAP Business One", and got these results, none of which have anything to do with SAP Business One:

So replacing a tag with plain text, does not work. This advanced search should have an option to filter by tag as well.

"Topics with no replies". If I am not mistaken, a reply is any answer or comment. Is there an option to show only Q&A without accepted answers? Perhaps this should be a drop down with several related options, like "Yes/No replies", "Yes/No comments", "Yes/No answers", "Yes/No accepted answers", etc. There is the Metadata drop down that seems perfect for the purpose.

entry.title: Re: How to configure T042E_WANFF(Number of Days Until Bil...
entry.content: Thank you for ur helpful advice! I understand this field is unavailable now.

entry.title: 回复： Public Cloud - Reset QM task status
entry.content:
Hi,

This is not supported in public cloud.

Best Regards
Matt

entry.title: Re: 在汇票业务过程中，能否新增汇票种类和票据类型（银承、商承等），系统暂未找到
entry.content:
Hi custom

Currently, BOE on the public cloud supports both bank acceptance and commercial acceptance types. However, the standard product does not provide configuration options for bill types or bill categories.

目前cloud上boe是支持银承和商承的类型的，但是标准产品里是不提供对汇票种类的和票据类型的配置的。

Hope the information could help you.

 

Best regards,

Lola

entry.title: Re: F4 help for Application Job in Public Cloud (2502 release)

entry.title: Re: Consuming a Business Technology Platform service from an S/4 HANA system using SM59 destination
entry.content: Perfect explanation. Appreciate your taking time to provide detailed explanation. Thanks for sharing!

entry.title: Re: Question About Contract Period Limits for Additional...
entry.content:
Hi,

For most of the additional tiers you just have to commit to a minimum of 3 months, no need to commit to the entire contract term.

There are a few exceptions especially for systems with very large HANA servers.

Best Regards
Henrik Strange

entry.title: Re: How to create your own ATC check in ABAP Development Tools for Eclipse
entry.content:
Hello @OlgaDolinskaja ,

Thanks for your quick feedback. We are trying to create elementary table type parameter only using either CHAR72 or STRING data type (as shown below), but still it's working fine without table type parameter only.

Could you please suggest if our understanding to your response is correct or if any other detailed documentation/example is available for us to refer.

Thanks alot.

 



Regards
Nitin Goyal

entry.title: Re: LE-WM using scan to count a Product during a TO confi...
entry.content:
It is a standard practice in some warehouse operations. It is faster, more convenient and less error prone to scan each piece of a product, instead of counting them. Go to any supermarket and see how cash registers work. You really don't need to mess up TO creation or any fancy solution. All you need to do is to implement a custom screen for a standard RF transaction. It is easy to do and it will work. 

I implemented a similar scenario for a telecommunication company. It was used during SIM cards picking. That was several years ago, in the times of physical SIMs.

entry.title: How to Find all my z programs or customised tcode, programs and reports
entry.content:
It is very easy to find these.  Open SAP Gui and choose the client , your username and passwords.

SE16 to open the Data browser of Abap workbench . Open for table TSTC which shows all Tcode and search Z* to display all Z t-code, programs, screens and description.

entry.title: Re: Portfolio Management – Enhanced Financial Planning integration
entry.content:
Hi @Kumaravel03 , 

the integration to the classic CO tables remains untouched. This means, if you continue to integrate via /RPM/FICO_INT_PLANNING, the plan cost are fetched from classic CO tables. If you want to use ACDOCP entries, you upload the plan cost via /RPM/FICO_INT_PLANNING_V2. 

Regards, Andrea

entry.title: Re: Order....: 1000820634 Residence time 1 not exceeded
entry.content: Thanks Dominik

entry.title: Re: Integration SAP PPM 6.1 with S/4HANA 2023 FP2
entry.content:
Hi Goedele,

this is a valid scenario. However you have to ensure that the communication between the OP and the PCE system is setup properly. For Financials, object links etc. I do not foresee any issues, it should be same as described in Note 2289330. The only thing that might be an issue with when it comes to Business Partner replication scenarios. However that largely depends on where BPs are produced and where they should be consumed, with local BPs it should again not be an issue.

Andrea

entry.title: Question About ''Group'' of BP Category
entry.content:
Hello everyone!
I’m working on an ECC-to-S/4HANA conversion tasks, and I have a question about the “Group” BP category. Specifically:
・What are the advantage of “Group” category? 
→In what scenarios or for what reasons is “Group” preferable to “Person” or “Organization”?

・Exclusive fields: 
→Are there any fields or functionalities that can only be used with “Group”?

Any insights would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,
Kou

entry.title: Re: Scheduling Data Load Jobs in Calendar Task
entry.content: Is that possible to pause and release the data load job through calendar?

entry.title: [診断エージェント -> SolMan Java(P4S)]の通信で使用するTLSのバージョンを制御するために必要な対応について
entry.content:
担当者様
平素よりお世話になっております。


◆通信経路
・診断エージェント -> SolMan Java(P4S)


◆TLSの要件
・1.1 以下のバージョンを使用しない
・出来る限り最新のバージョンを利用する(1.2か1.3が利用可能であれば1.3を利用する)


弊社のセキュリティ要件上、上記の通信経路で利用するTLSのバージョンを制御する必要があります。
TLSの要件を満たした通信を行うために必要な対応についてご教授をお願い致します。


以上、よろしくお願い致します。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: [診断エージェント -> SolMan Java(P4S)]の通信で使用するTLSのバージョンを制御するた...
entry.content:
ご担当者　様

平素よりお世話になっております。

接続タイプについて診断エージェントは2つの異なるライブラリを使用してSSL接続を確立できます。

１．IAIKライブラリは、次のために使用されます。 

  • P4S connections (e.g. to the Solution Manager AS Java)
  • the SCC Collector (SAP Cloud Connector Collector)
  • the SAPPingHTTPCollector

IAIKライブラリに基づく接続の場合、恐れ入りますが、TLS 1.3は現在サポートされておりません。

２．JVMのデフォルトのSSLエンジン(JSSE)は、次のために使用されます。 

  •  HTTPS接続(DPCプッシュなど)

通常、TLS 1.3はJVM 8.1.064以降サポートされております。SAP JVMリリースノート2944716をご参照してください。

特別な暗号方式をご要望でない場合には、 Ciphers Suites in Oracle JVM と JRE Cryptomapをご確認し、SAP Note2219315に従って関連するSAP JVMバージョンをご確認お願い致します。

なお、下記のノートをご参考いただければ幸いです。

2463712 - Diagnostics Agent TLS 1.2

3021677- Diagnostics Agent TLS 1.3

宜しくお願いいたします。

SAPサポート

entry.title: 回复： Public Cloud - Reset QM task status

entry.title: How to loop through all the data in a table and fetch the data point comments?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to fetch all the data point comments that are available in the table. Can anyone please help on how to write the script to achieve this (Need to know at which dimension combinations these comments were mentioned).There are nearly 1000 comments in the model. So I want to get the complete list at which datapoints it is used)

Kind regards,

Tha.Ram

entry.title: Re: What’s New Preview Available for SAP Analytics Cloud Q1 2025
entry.content: @Lothar_Köder @Devan_Gee See I think you both provided links to a different topic "job monitor" and not a new "transport/content monitor" for which details seem to be here in help files https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/18850a0e13944f53aa8a8b7c094ea29e/afcd8a9923cf4b0e869fea7312254c66.html?version=2025.2

entry.title: Re: How to trigger Workflow in SAP Commerce when A Produc...
entry.content:
Hi @ketkimujumdar 

Congratulations on successfully integrating SAP Commerce cloud with S/4Hana👍

So apart from @KunalBansal 's solution, you may also try out the OOTB Workflow Activation Script feature.

Regarding the workflow trigger, you can check out the activation script defined on your workflow template. It can be configured OOTB in the Backoffice or ImpEx so that each time a new product is imported/created from S4 into a specific product catalog, a new workflow instance will be automatically created out of the template to notify the product managers.

The Workflow Activation Script is basically a piece of Beanshell script attached to each workflow template, where you can check the current action/event like create, save or remove, and the attributes of the current product item like "approvalStatus" or "catalogVersion", etc. You can write whatever logic or conditions are required to trigger your workflow instances. 

Hope that help 🙂

entry.title: Re: Pre-check "Complete assigned notifications" on "Find...
entry.content: Since this is a Fiori Standard, my fiori consultant is not aware of how these changes can be performed. How can they perform it?

entry.title: Re: Scheduling Data Load Jobs in Calendar Task
entry.content: No. If you run the data load jobs via calendar they are typically unscheduled. Scheduling is done via calendar. If you want to pause/release the import job you have to do this directly in the calendar in the multi-action task.

entry.title: CDS for extract record from Purchase Condition records APP "Create Price Condition"
entry.content:
Hi all,

In our SAP Private Cloud, from the App "Create Price Condition" is possible to display the Condition Records. We need to have the CDSs for extract those records and to send them to Datasphere.

We found the CDS:  I_PURGPRCGCONDITIONRECORD

in that CDS is it possible to see the records with the Condition Table selection but is not possible to select record throught the parameters: Company Code, Supplier and Material.

 

Have you any suggest for to do the selection mentioned?

Thank you

Daniele

How would the process look like Any links are highly appreciated .

entry.title: From Paper Piles to Permit Smiles: Rethinking Compliance with SAP EHS
entry.content:
What are Environmental Permits? 

Environmental permits are legal documents that outline specific obligations your business must meet to protect air, water, and land. They can range from just a few pages to hundreds, often containing thousands of requirements that make compliance time-consuming and complex. Extracting, tracking, and updating these obligations can be overwhelming—and any oversight can result in serious non-compliance risks.

How Can SAP Environment, Health, and Safety Help 

Imagine skipping the manual extraction of the obligations and all that tedious typing when creating permits and tasks. Sounds too good to be true, right? Well, it’s not. 

With the latest feature of SAP Environment, Health, and Safety, you can create permits right from your existing documents, delegate responsibilities through tasks, and stay on track with automated escalations and email notifications. Instead of wrestling with stacks of paperwork, you can focus on the real compliance work that moves your business forward. 

How It Works 

In the My Permits app you can upload a PDF file, which will display alongside the permit creation form. This allows you to copy the relevant text directly into the required fields. For tasks, it’s just as easy: use the Manage Compliance Requirements app to upload the PDF and simply select whatever text you need. 

 

Example Scenario 

Let’s say you are an environmental manager at a business location and have just received a newly issued environmental permit. Your job is to ensure that the business at the location stays in compliance with the obligations stated in the permit. Let’s see how we can ease that process. 

Start with the Permit 

Your first task is to create the permit in the system. 

In the My Permits app, select Create from Document and upload a PDF file—your trusty reference document. 

 

The file appears right next to the permit creation form, so you can easily copy the relevant details into the form’s fields. 

 

Where Did the PDF Go? 

After you create the permit, you’re redirected to the Edit Compliance Requirements app. Head over to the Documents tab, and there it is—the PDF file that you used to create the permit, ready for reference.  

Need to add more files? Just select Add File and upload any additional PDFs you might need.  

 

Let’s Create Some Tasks 

To start creating some compliance tasks, navigate to the Tasks tab and choose Manage Tasks. 

 

After selecting Choose Document, you’ll be able to see all the documents you previously uploaded in the Documents tab. Select the file you want and click Continue. 

 

The file will open in the side-by-side viewer. Here’s where it gets really convenient: 

Hover over a paragraph and select it or manually highlight text from the document. Then choose the Create Task button that pops up. 

 

Choose your task type and you’ll see the task creation form. The text from the document that you selected is automatically filled in the Description field. Fill in all the relevant information, click Create and you're done! 

 

At the bottom of the form, you’ll find the Document section, which shows the name of the PDF file and the exact page where the text came from. This way, you always know where the details of the task originated. 

 

Rinse and Repeat 

Want to create more tasks? Navigate back to the side-by-side viewer and repeat the process as many times as you need. 

To stay on top of everything, paragraphs you’ve already used to create tasks will be highlighted in blue.  Tasks that are overdue stand out in red. And those that are done or canceled are shown in green. 

 

 Manual entry? That's so last version. Welcome to the future of getting things done.

entry.title: Cummulative quantities for scheduling agreement
entry.content:

how does the Cumulative work in scheduling agreement, which cumulatives we will have in SA, How does the system calculates them and make zero at end of the year.

entry.title: Re: SAP S4 HANA best practices on private or on-premises
entry.content:
Dear Reddy,

SAP's learning journey for Retail containing dozens of trainings (also Ebooks along with practicing and assessments) is available here:

https://help.sap.com/learning-journeys/500c950d7a261014b00b9ad6642ca7ec

I am not aware of free resources released by SAP.

Best practices are not available for the on-Premise S/4 Retail specifically.

Best regards,
Andras

entry.title: Re: Showed "Couldn't load file" in Payable Analytics"

entry.title: Re: Customer uses external DNS service
entry.content:
Hi,

I doubt this will work.

The SAP DNS servers will need to do DNS zone transfer / DNS forwarding to the customers DNS servers. If these are external, the SAP servers will most probable not be able to reach them.

Best Regards
Henrik Strange

entry.title: Add Button in Sales Order
entry.content:
Hi

  I have below code . I want to add button in Sales Order Form after Cancell Button

SAPbobsCOM.Company oCompany = new SAPbobsCOM.Company();
SAPbouiCOM.Application oApplication = new SAPbouiCOM.Application();

oCompany.Server = "10.0.1.28:30015";
oCompany.DbServerType = BoDataServerTypes.dst_HANADB;
oCompany.CompanyDB = "Test_LIVE";
oCompany.UserName = "manager";
oCompany.Password = "123";
oCompany.language = BoSuppLangs.ln_English;
oCompany.UseTrusted = true;

int connectionResult = oCompany.Connect();
if (connectionResult != 0)
{
throw new Exception("Error connecting to SAP Business One: " + oCompany.GetLastErrorDescription());
}

Thanks

entry.title: Re: New ABAP syntax, VALUE FOR skip appending entry if it already exists
entry.content:
Unfortunately it is not a sorted table and I do not have an option to change it. Is it still possible?

Also in your syntax it does not let me use FILTER after the lines( ).

Also I tried to reenact the realistic case but I realize now that maybe I didn't explain it very well.

In the real case this piece of code is being called inside of a loop where I am being given several entries for each key. On the first iteration we go through all the entries and everything is okay. But the program is a dynpro so when the user interacts with it somehow we restart the loop and we go over the same entries again. So my goal is to prevent that and just keep the entries from the first run, if we go over the entries again with the same key then we just need to update the values with the new ones. Is it still possible with the new syntax?


r_unduplicated_values = VALUE #( FOR row_of_tab_with_duplicates IN tab_with_duplicates
                                                       ( COND #( WHEN entry doesnt exist in OUR table r_unduplicated_values

                                                                        THEN add it to the r_unduplicated_values

                                                                       ELSE Update the values with the same key in r_unduplicated_Values)

entry.title: Packaging material in sales order without WM in S4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are using S4 HANA with materials managed in Storage locations (No WM / EWM).

My question is that the packaging material is decided later , depending upon the material which is going to be packed. Do we need to add packaging material already in the sales order or it can be added later in the outbound delivery?

entry.title: Enquiry on SQL Anywhere 17.0.10.6089: "SAP JRE" JRE180 Security Vulnerability
entry.content:
Hi, I'm currently using SAP Anywhere 17.0.10.6089 as the database for our application. SAP JRE located at `C:\Program Files\SQL Anywhere 17\bin64\jre180`. The installed JRE version is 8.0.31.

Did this version of SAP JRE (8.0.31) have any known security vulnerabilities? If so, I would appreciate guidance on how to obtain and apply the necessary updates or patches to mitigate the risks.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: What is shown under 'Latest replies'?
entry.content:
Those results come up first because "Best match" was chosen and the search term is the title or largest part thereof. Even then you do not have to scroll down very far, to get unrelated results. Sort it by date, and you hardly have to scroll down at all to get unrelated results:  https://community.sap.com/t5/forums/searchpage/tab/message?q=sap%20business%20one&sort_by=-topicPostDate&collapse_discussion=true.

The problem is probably that the search engine looks at all words in the search term separately, and then shows results that have the most occurences of one or more of the words in the title and/or body text. The tag is apparently only a minor consideration, or matches by tag are added at the end.

"To view "Q&A with no accepted solutions" you would need to go the SAP Managed tag page."

During the beta testing of the previous iteration of the SAP Community, a similar strange design decision was made (and later fixed). My comment back then applies here as well: "It is like a house with two showers, one shower only gives cold water, and the other only hot."

entry.title: [WilyHost Agent -> Introscope Enterprise Manager]の通信で使用するTLSのバージョンを制御するために必要な対応について
entry.content:
担当者様
平素よりお世話になっております。

◆通信経路
・[WilyHost Agent -> Introscope Enterprise Manager]
※具体的には、下記URLにある赤い矢印(RMI access)になります。

◆TLSの要件
・1.1 以下のバージョンを使用しない
・出来る限り最新のバージョンを利用する(1.2か1.3が利用可能であれば1.3を利用する)

弊社のセキュリティ要件上、上記の通信経路で利用するTLSのバージョンを制御する必要があります。
TLSの要件を満たした通信を行うために必要な対応についてご教授をお願い致します。

以上、よろしくお願い致します。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: I want “Setup” and “Processing” and “Labor” in COOIS (SAP S/4HANA Public Edition)
entry.content:
Hi

 I would like to compare planned and actual hours for “setup”, “processing”, and “labor”.

 

In COOIS, “Set up” and “Processing” could be compared.

However, “Labor” is not comparable.
There was actual time for “Labor” but no planning time.

Which of the following applies in "column set"?

 

please tell me…

entry.title: Re: [WilyHost Agent -> Introscope Enterprise Manager]の通信で...
entry.content:
ご担当者　様

平素よりお世話になっております。

サポートされているTLSのバージョンはご利用になるSAP JVMバージョンと繋がっています。

通常、TLS 1.2はSAP JVM 6.0.99以降サポートされておりますが、Introscope agent9.7及びより古いバージョンなどにはTLSv1.2がサポートされていない場合がございます。

詳細は、下記ドキュメントの前提条件｢Prerequisites｣部分をご参考お願い致します。

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/techops/3807996220.html?q=SSL+Communication+for+Introscope+Enterprise+Manager

TLS 1.３については下記のノートをご参考お願い致します。

2834475 - Does SAP NetWeaver AS Java support TLS 1.3?

2944716 - SAP JVM 8.1 Patch Collection 64 (build 8.1.064)

宜しくお願いいたします。

SAPサポート

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA DB Server Installation on SUSE Linux
entry.content:
hello,

please refer to SAPB1 admin guide that explains what components are Linux and what are Windows-based

entry.title: OpenID for SAC
entry.content:
Hi all,

Is it possible to configure OpenID Connect for user authentication  (SSO)  between SAC and IAS, when IAS is configured as a proxy ?

Or is SAML 2.0 the only supported and recommended method?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: How to inspect several material batch produced on one...
entry.content:
Hi Olivier,

As far as I know the inspection type 03 only creates one inspection lot at production order release, and inspection type 04 creates an inspection lot per Goods receipt on the production order. In case you do not use batch management (activated for the material) an inspection point setup in the routing/inspection plan is the way forward.

In our company we use the inspection points, defined to document the pallet number or date/shift, in relation to both inspection type 03 & 04 to log inspection results.

I know that there is a functionality to transfer the recorded Master Inspection result to a Batch classification characteristic (class type 023) but we are not utilizing the batch functionality.

Hope this helps.

greetings, Herman

entry.title: Inquiry on MT940 Deprecation and Switch to CAMT (ISO 20022)
entry.content:
There is an information from the house bank that SWIFT formats MT940 and MT942 will be discontinued as of October 2025. The bank has advised switching to the CAMT format (ISO 20022) with an update from version 02 to 08.

Will SAP support this transition to CAMT (ISO 20022) after October 2025?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Inquiry on MT940 Deprecation and Switch to CAMT (ISO...
entry.content:
SAP Business ByDesign already supports ISO 20022 for bank statements.

Format version ISO 20022 for bank statements has been updated based on camt.053.001.08. Depending on your bank agreements you can also use the lower versions of camt.053.001.02 or camt.053.001.04.

With release 2305, we provided the last update and changed to the current message definition camt.053.001.08, see Germany - Update of ISO Payment Format Versions.

entry.title: Re: SAC - Data overlap in graphic
entry.content: I have also similar problem. Does anyone have any solution?

entry.title: Re: Thresholds Prevent Unintended Deletion of Users when Provisioning with SAP Cloud Identity Servic
entry.content:
Thank you on that valueable content and insight.

What happens to scheduled jobs with this threshold?
e.g. you have 20 users and some misconfigured filters and a threshold of 5 and your job runs every 15 Minutes.

Will the schedule "stop" or will the job continue and delete every 15 minutes 5 users?

Best wishes,
Alex

entry.title: Re: Direct Network Path Backup in SAP Business One HANA D...
entry.content:
Hi,

essentially RSP backup on SAPB1H reads the backup path from SLD config.

you can mount backup folder in NFS format on Linux and point SLD to this path.

entry.title: Re: Tax Indicators in Sales area tab: Unable to change sa...
entry.content:
sap note: 3352416 

...

It is not possible to keep different tax classification in different sales-area in the same country since the tax classification for a customer depends on the country and not on the sales area.

The tax classification for a customer is related to sales/billing but it is not sales area specific in a manner that the combination of a country and a tax category is global for a customer.

This is a legal requirement. So if you change this field, it is changed for all sales areas in the same country.

....

SOLVE;

You can material master for different distrubition channel or

new sd condition record with VK11 tcode

entry.title: SAP PE Session 'SAP Signavio & LeanIX, an Integrated Approach to Transformation' (February 27)
entry.content:
Virtual

February 27, 2025

Agenda

Dear Valued Customers,

We are pleased to invite you this year’s first SAP Premium Engagement Session focusing on the important topic “SAP Signavio & LeanIX, an Integrated Approach to Transformation”. This event is taking place virtually on February 27, 2025. Please find the detailed agenda here.

We will continue these virtual SAP Premium Engagement Sessions – and have already a list of exciting topics, the next two sessions covering: RISE with SAP & SAP Premium Engagement on March 27th and SAP Premium Engagement Services for Datasphere, SAP BTP & Security May 8th. Watch out for the invitations.

In this event about LeanIX and SAP Signavio, we will be covering the following:

In the first part, our experts will introduce SAP Integrated toolchain for transformations, looking into unlocking the value with SAP Signavio and SAP LeanIX, as well as SAP Signavio and LeanIX integration setup.

In the second part of the session, we will see real use-cases from our customers, as well as some customer examples of journeys with SAP Premium Engagement support.

This is an excellent opportunity to gain actionable knowledge and network with like-minded professionals who are embarking on a similar journey towards digital transformation. We invite you to join us and participate in this engaging discussion.

Our Workshops

These sessions and workshop series focus on a specific topic and the purpose is to enable our customers to understand the product portfolio and innovative technologies of SAP in order to drive adoption and consumption. As specifically now, it is more important than ever to help companies to be successful and to respond to changing markets by transforming into intelligent enterprises in the experience economy.

Important

Please note that the 'Attend' button which can be found within this blog post does not serve as a formal registration for the event.

To officially register, please reach out to me, paul.schropp@sap.com and I will ensure that your registration is properly processed.

We look forward to having you join us for our upcoming events and thank you for your understanding!

Your feedback

Feel free to share your feedback and thoughts in the comment section below.

entry.title: Re: Error trying to activate CERB02 license: partner misconfiguration
entry.content: Just wait for a few days, they should contact you.

entry.title: I am using BAPI_BUPA_ROLE_CHANGE to change the valid to date of BP role BUP003.
entry.content:
Hi guys,

I am using BAPI_BUPA_ROLE_CHANGE to change the valid to date of BP role BUP003. I passed partner number, category, role and valid until date. Role is not getting changed and an Information message is displayed 'No changes were made to BP role BUP003 for partner'.  This behavior occurs after SAP upgrade to version SAP_BASIS Release 740 SP-Level 0021 Support Package SAPKB74021; SAP_ABA Release 740 SP-Level 0021 Support Package SAPKA74021.

Please let me know if some other OSS note needs to adopt or information needs to be passed.

entry.title: Re: What is shown under 'Latest replies'?
entry.content:
I'm pretty sure that the tag "sap business one" is not considered at all with @AnnePetteroe link (https://community.sap.com/t5/forums/searchpage/tab/message?advanced=false&allow_punctuation=false&q=sap%20business%20one), it's only best match by individual words 😉

EDIT: note that, unrelated to the tag "sap business one", there is a better match by all three words with double quotes, the result is a little bit different, presenting more three subsequent words "sap business one" at the top of the results (https://community.sap.com/t5/forums/searchpage/tab/message?q=%22sap%20business%20one%22).

entry.title: Re: How to inspect several material batch produced on one...
entry.content: Thank you Herman.

entry.title: Re: How to Find all my z programs or customised tcode, programs and reports
entry.content:
Better use se80, se95 or similar tool. But what was your question, you posted in Technology Q&A section not in Blogs ?

  • First, you should follow the Tour the SAP Community 2024  (until 2025 creation?)

entry.title: Re: How to inspect several material batch produced on one...
entry.content: In fact, I have Batch management, but I am trying to find a way to have multiple material batch inside my inspection, alomost when results recording. It's because I am thinking about inspection points.

entry.title: Re: DIALOG TO CALL OOALV TWICE AND OOALV SHOW WRONG DATA
entry.content:
In module create_a_two-part_container OUTPUT: Check that go_docking_two_part is initial before creating a new object. Same for go_split_top_two_part.

Use both: methods free for containers and controls (first) and clear/free the variables for containers and controls.

I would move "free and clear" to process after input, maybe before leave to screen 0.

Are you sure the part with initializing containers and controls will pass? You have a condition (if p_01 = abap_true). Check it. Use debugging.

entry.title: Error when trying to get ALV data from standard program
entry.content:
Hello there,

I am new to SAP and ABAP and need some advice here. I am trying to write a z program that receives information out of the ALV grid of a standard program and writes these into an excel file. I tried the following code:

 

cl_salv_bs_runtime_info=>set(    EXPORTING display  = abap_false
                                             metadata = abap_false
                                             data     = abap_true ).

SUBMIT (p_report) USING SELECTION-SET p_var AND RETURN.
TRY.
      cl_salv_bs_runtime_info=>get_data_ref( IMPORTING r_data = DATA(ls_data) ).
      ASSIGN ls_data->* TO <lt_data>.

    CATCH cx_root INTO DATA(e_txt).
      WRITE: / e_txt->get_text( ).
ENDTRY.

 

Everytime I run it I get an Exception of the type "cx_sy_struct_attributes" that isn't declared in RAISING. I've tried to find the error with the debugger but I could not find much. I only know that the error occurs in the following code:

cl_salv_bs_runtime_info=>get_data_ref( IMPORTING r_data = DATA(ls_data) ).

Can someone help me find the error or has a different idea on how I get the AVL data from a standard program (in my case RTPM_TRL_SHOW_FLOWS) into an internal table?

Thanks in advance 🙂

entry.title: Re: What is shown under 'Latest replies'?
entry.content: @Sandra_Rossi, You are probably right about the search engine not considering tags. Double quotation marks do give more relevant results, but we still get unrelated ones. Also, any posts that do not have the search term in them are now effectively not in the search result. This only shows once more that the advanced search is not useful.

entry.title: Re: Product Replication from SAP ECC to SAP CPQ using BTP...
entry.content: @nileshnagane12 new REST API does support permissions. I would recommend it even for sequential replication

entry.title: Re: SAP Logon Colorful Icons in Newer Themes Belize, Quartz, ?
entry.content: Hi Frank, is this still impossible? I find myself using the SAP Signature Theme still because it's the only one with icons I can instantly recognize. I think Quartz would be acceptable for me (and preferred) if the icons were more recognizable (maybe by using the Signature icons or colorized versions of the Quartz icons).

entry.title: Re: SAP ERP公有云 [SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502] 亮点前瞻
entry.content: 👍🙇‍

entry.title: Re: Build and Launch a Simple Spring Boot App(web-service) on SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hello @manojkumargct 

You can try to add the tomcat as a target env in the manifest.yml and also to using the sap_javabuildpack_jakarta 

....

 buildpacks:
      - sap_java_buildpack_jakarta
    env:
      TARGET_RUNTIME: tomcat
....
 
I assume it should works now.

entry.title: foreign currency fioris don´t work
entry.content: foreign currency fioris don´t work

entry.title: Re: SAP SQL Anywhere RESTORE with RENAME - What is the correct script for restoring database
entry.content: Hello, Chris!

entry.title: Re: How to Find all my z programs or customised tcode, programs and reports
entry.content: Noted. Thank you very much.. My question is how do i find smart forms used in these custome reports

entry.title: SAP Certification attempt (CER001)
entry.content:
Hello,

I am planning in purchasing an SAP Certification attempt (CER001). Can it be assigned to another user just like an SAP Learning Hub license?
